name: subagent-evidence-map

defaults.sources: Use only provided source notes, inspected artifacts, or explicit uncertainty.
defaults.source_policy: Separate direct evidence, weak evidence, contradictions, and missing evidence.
defaults.output_format: Markdown sections: Question, Evidence Map, Contradictions, Missing Evidence, Confidence.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Build an evidence map for question: {question}. Sources: {sources}. Source policy: {source_policy}. Output format: {output_format}
